name: Beef and Pasta Primavera (1993 National Beef Cook-Off Recip
recipeIngredient: Steak, cut into 1 inch thick strips
2 1/2 cups (8 ounces) frozen vegetable mixture, defrosted
1/4 cup Freshly packed fresh basil leaves, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions. Keep warm.
2. Trim fat from beef steak. Cut into lengthwise halves and then crosswise into 1/8-inch thick strips.
3. Heat olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add garlic (1/2 at a time) and stir-fry for 1 to 2 minutes or until the outside surface of beef is no longer pink. Season with salt. Remove beef to a large bowl; keep warm.
4. In the same skillet, combine vegetable mixture, broth, and red pepper. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
5. Add vegetable mixture, pasta, tomatoes, and basil to beef; toss to combine. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese; serve immediately.
Total preparation and cooking time: 30 minutes
